div.p: Architecture: x86-64 / 4KB Pages Logic Flow: TLB → Page Walk → Fault Management → Page Replacement → Load
Path: MMU Page Walker Action: Trigger hardware walk Cycles: ~50-200
✓ PFN found in memory ✓ Check RW/NX permissions ✓ Update Access/Dirty bits
✗ DISK WRITE swap_writepage(victim) I/O Wait: High
Source: /dev/sda1 (Offset 0x2) Action: DMA Transfer to RAM
Source: New Heap Allocation Action: memset(frame, 0)
